case_title: OTIS DENTAL, INC. ET AL VS. VERIZON WIRELESS SERVICES, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE CT CORPORATION SYSTEM] SERVED JUN-14-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS SERVICES, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANDREW LEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OTIS DENTAL, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY OTIS DENTAL, INC. LEE, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS SERVICES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OTIS DENTAL, INC. LEE, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS SERVICES, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LEONARD BEAUVAIS FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS SERVICES, LLC
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2024 - CASE HEARD. PARTIES ENTER TENTATIVE AGREEMENT. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-30-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF MATTER IS RESOLVED, NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS OTIS DENTAL, INC. AND ANDREW LEE ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF OTIS DENTAL, INC. IS REPRESENTED BY ANDREW LEE. DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS SERVICES, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LEONARD BEAUVAIS. DEFENDANT INDICATES THEY WERE SERVED AND READY TO PROCEED. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS OTIS DENTAL, INC. AND ANDREW LEE ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS SERVICES, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
